introSection: Jerome's Wooden Dragon, previously known as Jungle Dragon, is a wooden roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Yubei, Chongqing, China. It was built by Great Coasters International and designed by Skyline Attractions.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 12 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Jerome's Wooden Dragon, previously known as Jungle Dragon, is a wooden roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Yubei, Chongqing, China. It was built by Great Coasters International and designed by Skyline Attractions.



2 trains with 12 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.
